summary:
GEOPOLITICAL CONFLICTS AND ALLIANCES: Brandon details visions of international maneuverings, noting Japan's assistance to the United States regarding the Strait of Hormuz and its economy, which he symbolically associates with the Boomer Sooner wagon. He foresees a coordinated effort by Xi Jinping, North Korea, Russia, and Vietnam to orchestrate a takeover of Taiwan, deliberately targeting strategic allies like Japan, South Korea, and Australia. Concurrently, Brandon warns of attacks on computer chip manufacturing and medical supplies from China designed to create critical shortages. Additionally, he observes European leaders discussing the Strait and conflicts involving Iran, while predicting that Donald Trump will play a role in liberating nations such as Iran, Cuba, Venezuela, and North Korea from dictatorial regimes.

DOMESTIC POLITICS AND SOCIETAL DIVISION: Brandon recounts efforts by the Democratic Party to impeach Donald Trump and undermine his influence ahead of the midterm elections, describing Trump as an obstacle to Agenda 2030. He outlines a globalist push for social credit scores and the erosion of freedoms, specifically pointing to attempts to restrict the Second Amendment. Brandon asserts that the heavily armed American populace acts as a deterrent against tyranny, warning that political maneuvers are attempting to spark a civil war and deepen the divide between red and blue states. He also highlights political corruption and emphasizes the need for the Save America Act to ensure election integrity through voter ID requirements.

WEATHER WARFARE AND TECHNOLOGICAL THREATS: Brandon discusses the reality of weather manipulation, citing declassified CIA documents confirming geoengineering efforts. He predicts governments will lose control of their weather weapons, resulting in superstorms, uncontrollable tornadoes, and severe droughts that devastate modified crops. Furthermore, Brandon foresees catastrophic cyber warfare, predicting hackers from China and Russia will attack the United States power grid, leaving regions without electricity for weeks, similar to blackouts in Cuba. He also warns of the misuse of technologies like AI, quantum computing, and CERN to open demonic portals.

IMPENDING TERRORISM AND STEALTH COMMUNICATIONS: Brandon urgently warns of coordinated terrorist plots targeting Christian and Jewish gatherings during the window between Passover and Easter. He describes a D-Day-style activation of sleeper cells planning mass-casualty lone-wolf attacks on places of worship and public events across North America, Europe, and the Vatican. Brandon reveals a vision of enemy forces utilizing stealth communications to bypass signal jammers, routing their messages through a World War II-era radio tower located in the snowy mountains of Northern Europe. He emphasizes the critical need for heightened awareness from law enforcement to intercept these plots.

ASSASSINATION PLOTS AND CORRUPTION EXPOSURES: Brandon urges intense intercession for various public figures. He warns of specific assassination plots against Benjamin Netanyahu, suggesting the involvement of Mossad and chemical warfare threats against Israel from Damascus. Brandon calls for protection over Donald Trump's children due to retaliatory schemes linked to the assassination of Qasem Soleimani. He highlights the perilous situation of independent journalist Nick Shirley, who faces threats via poisoned food for exposing urban corruption. Brandon also expresses a desire for Elon Musk to undergo a radical conversion and utilize Starlink to broadcast the gospel.

SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND CHURCH UNIFICATION: Brandon prophesies a massive global spiritual awakening, particularly in Asia and North Korea, envisioning unprecedented miracles. He describes an impending transformation within the Christian church where racial and denominational walls will collapse, uniting believers into a cohesive force. Brandon shares his excitement over the groundbreaking of a new youth facility and the miraculous provision of a parking lot built by the city, viewing these as crucial preparations for the worldwide revival. He also emphatically calls for supernatural rain to break ongoing droughts across Texas and the Midwest.
rawData: [March 23, 2026]-[The CIA admits weather manipulation just like the Lord said]-[https://youtu.be/US8rZ7oprqo]-[Thank you for joining us tonight for prayer. We're going to go over the things the Lord showed us in the last video on Friday night. We have a lot to share, so I'll try to make it as quick as possible so we can pray longer tonight over our nation. Passover is coming April 1st. I found out April 1st is Passover, and we've been praying because the Lord kept saying to pray over Passover. April Fool's Day, which is really wild because April 1st is Passover. Kind of strange, kind of different. Here we are. Good evening, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Let's go over some of the things that we have seen in the news over the last 48 hours or so, and then we're going to talk about what the Lord showed us in the video back on Friday night. Braden said there were some cool things that happened. I don't know what you found, but I have to get that. Well, I'll just talk while you get everything ready so we can flow. In the last video, the Lord showed us a lot of stuff. I am praying for the nations and I'll start off with this: I saw Japan helping in the days ahead with pressure to help out with the strait, to help out with the security over the oil and all the assets, trying to be a buddy to the United States of America. And I saw the Boomer Sooner covered wagon. If you follow OU football, they have the Boomer Schooner wagon. It says Oklahoma Sooners on it. It's a white covered wagon led by horses. The horses run around every time they make a touchdown at the home games for OU. Well, I saw Sooners again over Japan concerning their economy. What does that mean? I don't know. We see in part, but I know that this represents something significant with the Sooner wagon. It's interesting because it is something we're familiar with from OU. We love you. Then I saw them getting battleships and going down towards where they need to help us out with the Strait. But as they were doing this, I saw a plan being orchestrated like a puppet master: Xi Jinping, North Korea, Russia, and I believe Vietnam in the background. They were devising a plan to take over Taiwan. As I was watching them, they were targeting strategic allies of Taiwan: Japan, South Korea, and Australia. People were standing in the gap for Taiwan. I could see them trying to come up with a plan to take Taiwan again. When this happened, I saw a major attack against our computer chips and our medical supplies concerning certain medications that come out of China, trying to create a shortage when they try to take Taiwan. I could still see a covering of prayer. This is what I am trying to tell you all as we keep praying for Taiwan to sustain it in prayer. I am believing for a major revival in Asia. I could see them devising a plan for the computer chips. As I was looking at Europe, I could see Macron, and he was talking in meetings about helping out with the Strait and the war going on with Iran. He said, 'He made his bed; now let him lie in it.' He was talking to the other nations, including England, Italy, and Germany. They were saying, 'They've made their bed; now let them lie in it.' I saw them talking to the Democratic Party to devise a plan to make Trump look foolish concerning the midterms. 'How do we get him impeached? How do we get him overthrown?' concerning the midterms in November. They would want the House and the Senate. I saw certain key Democratic faces asking, 'How do we get our stronghold back that we're losing?' But as this happened, I saw a splitting of America, a dividing of the red and the blue with a civil war trying to break out on our shores. Agenda 2030 was the main push for a new global order. Trump was a log in the road concerning Agenda 2030. They wanted to remove the log so that they could push their agenda concerning our downfall, with social credit scores and things like that, where you are not able to live free. They are targeting gun laws for the Second Amendment, trying to put great restraints on it, because as the Second Amendment goes, so goes America and its stability. You might say, 'Well, that should bring more security and stability.' No, that is what they are afraid of when you have a bunch of rednecks with AR-15s and semi-automatic weapons. You realize that they are their own army. There are enough backwoods brothers here who have enough to support the United States military for a long time with rounds of ammunition. That is why we have never been invaded—because we have a backup to the backup. We are the backup to the military. You're not going to come into our towns with a Red Dawn in the middle of Oklahoma. Try that in some little town in Oklahoma; good luck. They won't make it out. I can assure you most families have ten firearms. You're just not going to do that, especially in Kansas, Oklahoma, Arkansas, Missouri, Texas, Louisiana, Mississippi, Alabama, Kentucky, and Tennessee. I saw that dividing of America trying to create civil war and unrest. As I was looking in the spirit again, I saw weather manipulation and modification. We were praying against weather manipulation concerning the major drought. The Lord brought it up to me all day: 'Brandon, speak to the drought tonight. Speak to the rain. Call the rain to come forth.' For as they try to control the weather, they will lose control. Most people say, 'Brandon, that is some wild stuff. I don't think there's any validation to it.' Then they see it in the news. Today, we see articles that Braden or someone found. Show this: 'CIA accused of poisoning the sky with toxins as files expose secret weather control agenda.' A secret weather control agenda—isn't that interesting? Since March 17th, we've been talking about weather manipulation and weather warfare. As they try to gain control, they will lose control. I saw superstorms coming with the strongest winds and largest hail. They will have to make a new category of tornado because Category 5 will not be big enough. The tornadoes will start to become out of control. Here is another one: 'CIA's 1965 declassified files expose weather war weapon, igniting RFK Jr.'s fight to halt sky toxins.' So they were planning this in 1965. Interesting. So here we are in 2026. How much have they perfected what they were trying to implement in 1965 and 2026? What have they perfected? I guarantee you a lot. That article just came out on March 18th. So what we are seeing in the spirit over the last year—and I've told you concerning weather manipulation, weather modification, things concerning hurricanes, mega storms, downbursts, droughts, and mega rains in some areas, and droughts so bad that they'll not even have crops that are working because they've genetically modified seeds—I said, 'You'll have fields that are completely barren because the crops won't grow that year because they've messed with them so much.' I told you all you need to prepare. This is what we're praying about. I have to say all this is what I believe the Lord has shown me and my opinion. When I see that they are declassifying stuff, saying, 'Hey, this is it. Declassified. Look over here. Look over here. Remember, look over here.' This isn't big news anymore to us. We're trying to hide it from over here. We don't want you to see it over here because we're doing something over here. But now we can show you what we're doing over here because this isn't the big deal; this over here is the big deal. I said what will happen in the days ahead will be weather warfare between governments, and they will use portals and CERN and demonic things. I said they're scanning these tablets with AI and quantum computing to create tunnels in the spirit realm, demonic portals to bring forth a satanic agenda through witchcraft and things that are very dark. This is what we've been praying over. But now, as we see them say, 'Look over here, this is declassified,' what I tell you is a file. I said, 'They're going to open the file and they're going to start to share their secret things.' It's just been a couple of days. So, this happened this week. Everything the Lord tells us is coming to pass in bits and pieces: we see in part, hear in part, but the part we're hearing, we're seeing. Not all of it, I believe. People say, 'Well, Brandon, do you feel like you can control things through prayer? As the body of Christ, do you believe you can stop things through prayer?' With all my heart, we're the bride of Christ. We are the salt of this earth. As he is, so are we in this world. Whenever he said, 'You will raise up a million-man and woman prayer army throughout the world,' create seven different channels. We've done it, and Braden is working as hard and as fast as he can to raise up these channels all throughout the world, translating them. That is what he worked on all last night—translating these videos into different languages, getting them ready to release to the nations so that they can help pray with us and understand what we're saying. It takes a lot of work. He's very busy. He spends hours and hours doing this. Last night he was up until early in the morning working. Finally, I came in and said, 'You've got to go to bed. You can't do this anymore. You've got to take care of yourself and have sleep.' He said, 'Daddy, these people need to know. They need to know what's coming. These other nations, Daddy, need to know.' I understand that, but we're one team. God will raise up more people. I'm so thankful for a son who is as dedicated as Braden is. He's a hard worker and a good kid. Paisley's good, too; she's probably watching. Paisley helps out with cooking and all kinds of little stuff because Mama is trying to do things with her eBay and Poshmark. We're running 90 miles an hour, but we're so thankful for every single one of you that tune in and pray with us, taking this time seriously, praying for my family and protection. I told them we're talking about it tonight. There's nobody else that has the guts—to be polite—to come on here and say what we say. We get criticized, but nobody has the guts to come on here and say what we say by the spirit of God and warn you of that which is to come. We have a bunch of cowards in the body of Christ because they don't want to say things. 'What if you're wrong?' If I'm wrong, I'll come out right now and tell you I've missed it. If I miss it, I repent and we keep walking. All of us have a tendency to miss it. Nobody's perfect. I'm not here to put on a show for you and be a Hollywood celebrity Christian. Nobody here is trying to be a celebrity. The Lord said, 'You'll be known throughout the world, Brandon, in the days ahead. Enjoy this time. Enjoy what I've been doing with you right now because it's about to accelerate to another level.' When you have government agencies and law enforcement watching you—hello, everybody, we're glad you're here from special groups—that's all I will say. We're so thankful that you take us seriously and watch us. I know for a fact that I've been told Eric Trump watches, some of the boys. I've heard Don watches me before, but I don't think he watches me all the time. But I'm so thankful that we have people in and close to government and celebrities who watch us, and we give all the glory to God. I believe in these last days, accuracy will be important. I have seen lots of fertilizer in the back of vans and semi-trucks and things concerning Timothy McVeigh. I still believe this exists. From the things I have heard, you need to pray over this. This is a very serious topic. When we were praying last time, I told you I saw drones attacking our oil facilities with C4. The Lord specifically said, 'Pray over Tuttle. Pray over Louisiana. Pray over the Houston area. Pray over the areas that have major oil refineries and gas production facilities in America.' As President Trump has said, 'In the next 48 hours, if you do not open up the Strait, we will attack all your facilities: electric, natural gas, all of it. We're going to eradicate you.' I told you what the spirit of the Lord said. By the time this is over, they will be put back into the Stone Age with their electric, infrastructure, and all of their stuff. It will be a wound that will not be fatal because they will participate in Ezekiel 38 and 39 in the days ahead. This is all biblical. What did the Lord say? All this was happening so that Donald Trump would liberate the people of Iran so they could have a major revival from a dictatorship. He said, 'I'm going to liberate Cuba. I'm going to liberate Venezuela.' And he said, 'I personally will take care of North Korea.' So we pray for our brothers and sisters in North Korea. The Lord said, 'I will deal with Kim Jong-un like I did Pharaoh. I will shake the nation. I will shake Kim Jong-un and his family.' I truly believe that God loves the North Korean people. God loves the Asian people. He loves us all. But I'm telling you, they have been underneath that boot of a tyrant, Kim Jong-un. I believe with all my heart that God himself is going to liberate the people of North Korea. He said, "I have not forgotten you. I have not forgotten the people of North Korea. I have not forgotten you. Your prayers are coming before my throne." And I believe with all my heart, we're about to see the people of North Korea have a window of revival just like all these others. Why? Because God doesn't want that any man should perish, but all come to repentance. And we are in the last of the seconds of the last of the last days. And as we were praying tonight for revival in China, revival in all these major nations that have never seen revival like they should, we're calling it forth and we're believing for this major outpouring for the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. And I believe we're going to see signs and wonders follow them that believe. But it will not just be these miracles that you saw. Well, this lady had a hangnail and she got prayer. Nothing wrong with having a hangnail, but we're going to see miracles that nobody can deny—signs and wonders that nobody is going to be able to say, "I don't believe it." God's going to raise the dead. The Lord is going to part the sea for this generation. And he said, "I'm going to show up and I'm going to show off to this generation." But what was the thing he said the most? "I'm bringing down racial walls. I'm breaking dividing walls throughout the nations. And you will function as brothers and sisters without racial tension." There will be—like most people say, "Well, you know, there's an African-American church, there's a white church, there's a Hispanic church, there's an Asian church." He said He's going to mix them all up together, and everybody's going to be one family moving as a body, and we're not going to have our petty differences anymore. The Lord's not coming back for a whipped church; He's coming back for a glorious church. And the Lord said, "I'm bringing down racial walls in my church." And this is not just concerning color of skin, but concerning, "Well, you're Catholic, I'm charismatic and you know, you're Baptist," and we don't fellowship with each other because we have differences of opinion. And the Lord said, "I'm bringing all those walls down, too." And he said, "Remember in war times where everybody came together in World War II to make America work, make America great again, whatever? Everybody joined together with one mission. The women helped out in the factories. The kids did something. Everybody had something to help out to make America stay afloat." And the Lord said, "What's coming is great persecution against my bride, my church, Brandon, but in this you will see everybody come together and you'll see the walls that have divided you be no more. And you'll be—I don't really care. You believe in the baptism of the Holy Ghost or not, I don't care. Let's just all join together and witness until it's all hands on deck." You're going to see a major revival that will be all hands on deck. For the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. And the Lord told us as we were praying tonight, we were praying, interceding for a major move of God, a major harvest of souls, for this youth building that we're building at our church, getting it around, getting the things ready. I saw them breaking ground. We've been waiting for I can't tell you how long. Since last July, we've been praying and giving to that and believing God for that. And today to drive by it and see that the ground is being broken and that the city finally let it go. The city fought us and fought us for where we were going to put that building and now we're getting breakthrough in this. And the Lord said, "Do you see that football field over there?" There's a high school football field. He said, "Do you see that football field, Brandon? There's a young man that's going to come over and he's going to get radically saved and he's going to be reaching the nations for me." I've interceded for that forever. But to see the ground broken tonight, I said, "Do you see first the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation?" But we had the city come against us so hard in that area. They said, "We don't want to build in there." The neighbors, everybody—it's like an act of Congress just to build a youth facility because you got Sister Clipboard over there saying, "We don't want that over here. We don't want these kids over here." And it's terrible. But finally, the favor of God, you get the finance. And we believe we do it debt-free. There's things that you just keep reaching out for, and you know that God has called you for such a time as this. And I said, "Raising up these buildings, doing what God's called us to do because we have to have it done before this major revival starts. We have to have all this done." And it was even amazing. There's a field next to where we attend. And I always told them, I said, "I see a parking lot over there, but that field is not for sale." Well, the city bought that field and they said they're going to build a school there and they're paving the whole thing with asphalt and concrete for a parking lot. Didn't cost the church a dime. I just thought, in my mind I'm thinking that's going to cost millions of dollars to get all it done. But God comes through a different way. And I was in shock as I look at the parking lot being paved right now. They're working on it. And I told them when I first went there because the Lord said, "In a two-year window, you're going to pray here and there's going to be a great revival break forth and they'll be lined up down the road." I said, "Lord, where are they going to park?" He said, "Over there." I said, "Well, we got to buy that field." But me thinking so small, God goes and has the city build a school there and they're paving the parking lot right now for us. And I said, "We didn't spend a dime. The taxpayers did and they got it all done for the school. But when the school's not going on at night, maybe they'll let us rent it. I don't know." But I thought, "Isn't that amazing that it's going to be an elementary school or whatever, but it's already getting paved. It's a parking lot." But I thought, "God, you have a way of providing and you're a way maker." He's a way maker, but you can't put him in your little box thinking you have to operate in this area. And then you got the youth facility across and in the red zone. You got the football stadium that God has had over there on Friday nights. All the kids come over and instead of going doing drugs and sleeping around, they come over and have free pizza and Cokes and stuff and they keep out of trouble and it keeps the crime rate down. They're having revival with these youth just by having something across the street from the football stadium and a place for them to go that's an alternative. And I said, "This is what it's about, being the salt." But it's exciting to see things come to pass today. As I was praying, I've been interceding for things and saying, "There's the parking lot, and this is the building that the devil has tried to stop." I said, "You got to let it go." And the Lord said, "Brandon, I'm going to do something major. I'm going to do something major." And when you see in part here, in part there, you think it's going to be that next month, two months, three months. But now is the year of 1 Corinthians 5:5, getting the church ready for the bride getting ready. He said, "Are you ready for the harvest? You're my harvesters. You're my closures. You are the closers. This generation is the closers. Are you ready for the fruit for the babies that are coming? Be patient with my babies." And as he said, "Stretch forth your net." When we had that Satanist get saved in this last video—or two videos ago—he emailed and said, "I was in the cult." How long did you say he was in the cult for? I don't know; it was a long time. I believe Diana has the email. And the Lord said, "Reach out. Love on the Satanist. Love on the people that are so lost. They just need help. They need freedom." And he got born again, and we were so excited about that. Could you read it if you find it again? She gets an average—and no exaggeration—of over 10,000 emails a day, so she has to scan through a lot of them because some of them email seven times in a time frame and they spam the thing. We're so thankful for the ones that are trying to help find news articles and everything, but there's a lot of people who email a lot. But okay, so as we saw that, what else did we see? B, you stopped at warfare. Weather warfare. But I know that I was talking about what I said about what we saw in the last video. You saw Agenda 2030. I saw Agenda 2030. I saw a noose around humans, or whatever, to control them—trying to control the people with a noose in America so that they raise up a major civil war. And I saw a plan, and I saw a snake coming up out of the Gulf of America again. Okay, go ahead. You can read it, lover. "I'm a regular viewer of your live streams, and I am writing because I believe your recent messages were directed specifically at me. For years, I've been deeply involved in an occult and practiced witchcraft, including for things that I now understand were deeply wrong on a spiritual level. My studies into the occult and my personal experiences eventually led me to the undeniable conclusion that Jesus truly is the Son of God who died for our sins. I truly believe it. Over the last two weeks, I have been praying for guidance on how to be saved and for Jesus to speak directly to me. During your recent live stream, you mentioned details so shocking and specific to my situation that I knew it was a sign to get my attention. Tonight, when you called for the occultist watching to recite the prayer to break the spiritual contracts and reject the devil, I followed along. I am committed to using what I have learned to serve Jesus exclusively, and I want to learn everything I can about him. Having said the prayer, I would now like to request a Bible to help me on this journey." And then we gave him a Bible, and we are excited that he gave his heart to Jesus and we could pray for him. I was just like, "Wow, it's awesome." It's just cool to be a part of somebody's journey. It's just cool that you all are a part of it with us, praying for the lost. And I want to say this: I know that the things we said about Bibi offended a lot of people in this last video, being upset about me saying I was anti-Semitism or had antisemitism or whatever. Folks, I love the Jews. I am the furthest thing from anti-Semitism ever. Seriously, I love all races. I don't care if you're purple with pink polka dots—I love you. If you're a devil worshiper, if you are a follower of Muhammad, or you like some kind of whatever—if you think you're a girl and you're dressed up as a man with dog ears, I don't care. You're a human being and I love you. Do you understand? So if I'm saying something about it, I don't drink the Kool-Aid concerning certain people when it comes to Bibi or think I'm standing against Israel. I love Israel. I pray for Israel all the time. I want the peace of Jerusalem. But when I tell you I see something dark behind somebody and I see their life is in danger, and the Lord specifically says there's something concerning this man... I'm not knocking the man. I pray for him same as I prayed for Joe Biden. But I told you, just because I don't agree with everything a government does—just like I love my nation and pray for our nation. I think America is the greatest place; it's the greatest thing since sliced bread. America is awesome to me. I love where we live. But I cannot back up abortion. I don't back up homosexuality. I don't back up the things that I deem dark. Period. And I love the Buddhists. We've led I don't know how many of them to Jesus. I got 15 Buddhists saved last night—15! Do you understand? All glory to Jesus. But I want you to hear that again: we got 15 Buddhists saved last night. I don't know anybody else doing that. If so, I support them, I love them, and we'll pray for them. But I'm going to tell you: I love every culture, every creed, every color. I don't care what you look like. But I'm telling you what I've seen concerning darkness, concerning that man. So if anybody says I'm bringing antisemitism or anything, you're ignorant. I'm not trying to stir up anything. I'm telling you that you need to pray for him because I said his life is in danger. And I truly believe still to this day his life is in danger. And what did I say? Mossad. I said Mossad will be involved in this. You said, "Well, Brandon, that's crazy." I said, "I heard it." I saw Bennett coming back. I said their plan would be to bring forth Bennett back. They said, "What does that mean?" I don't know. I hear in part, see in part. But we pray about it. So I pray for his protection. I pray for Bibi's protection. I pray for Trump's protection. I pray for Don Jr., Eric, Tiffany, Barron, and Ivanka all the time because I saw the plan for an eye for an eye. When did I see this? Back this time last year. And I said I saw a plan coming against his children to derail his presidency with grief. And the Lord said this time last year, "You must pray for his sons." For I saw, because of Qasem Soleimani and other generals, they were mad about it. And they said, "We can't get to him, but we'll get to what he loves." And I said, "You must pray for his kids." So we'll pray for them again tonight and continue to pray for Elon Musk for a radical conversion. I pray that Elon Musk will be the greatest evangelist ever to hit the planet. Wouldn't it be amazing to use Starlink to get the gospel throughout the whole world? He's the richest person in the world to fund the gospel. It takes finances to get the gospel preached. And for security for people like me... you know it, I'm not going to bow down. And I'm going to say that the Lord said, "Brandon, what I've had you say so far is nothing compared to what I'll have you say in the days ahead. You're called to say the hard things. Tell them the things I say, and I'll protect you. I'll watch out for you." Now, I've been advised, "Brandon, you need security." I've had huge men say, "Brandon, you need to do this. You need to do that." And we're looking into all that, but do I believe my angels watch over me? With all my heart. But because we live in a fallen world and we've got crazy people out there... Diana and I... Charlie Kirk, I believe, he believed in the blood of Jesus. He was a Christian. But when things got real to me was last year whenever Charlie Kirk went home, and that's when the Lord said, "You've got to do things different." And that's fine. I still believe in the angels—Big George is here. I still believe in that with all my heart. But when I have law enforcement and people in my inner circle telling me, "You need protection. You need these things," that's fine. Don't go preach in a meeting without having security with you. That's fine. Nobody else says what I say. Nobody. I think Uebert Angel maybe says some big bold things, but I don't know him that well. People can try to compete with me. I guess he's a man in Africa or something. I don't know. This guy's like you. I don't try to be like anybody; I want to be like Jesus. Where we are in these end times, I know we're about to see some radical things. As I was praying about the sky, the asteroids, and the signs of the heavens, the Lord said, "I'm bringing a great shaking to awaken the nations, and fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knees, such as weather manipulation." The CIA has now confessed to it. Isn't that crazy, folks? What we pray about is in the news months later. Aliens now? Remember I told you, watch for the aliens; they're coming. They're going to talk about aliens in the days ahead, and everybody is going to be talking about it. I told you darkness would be on Cuba; I told you this time last year. Cuba will go dark with cyber warfare and it will be completely blacked out by America's hand, and Cuba will be dark for days. I saw it was a huge span. When this happens, there will be other hackers from other nations, China and Russia, that will attack our power grid in America. There will be cities without power in America.
